top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Tumble as AI Trades Unwind, Threatening Bull Run
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks plunged, imperiling the world’s biggest rally, as investors pulled back from artificial intelligence bets that have fueled the bull market in global equities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Isabel Schnabel: From money market funds to stablecoins: lessons for central banks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Foreign couples are turning Japan into a wedding destination
top_signals.summary: Personal and cultural connections, as well as a weak yen, are driving more foreign couples to choose Japan to mark major life events.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
